name: Lemon Sour Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a bowl; stir thoroughly.
2. Slowly stir in milk until well combined.
3. Cook mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until boiling and thickened.
4. Remove pan from heat. Blend a small amount of hot mixture into egg yolks.
5. Return yolk mixture to the pan with the hot sauce; cook and stir for 2 minutes over medium heat.
6. Add butter, lemon peel, and lemon juice. Stir in sour cream.
7. Spoon filling into prepared pie shell. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar and vanilla until soft peaks form.
8. Gradually add remaining sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
9. Place meringue over the pie; seal edges.
10. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 12-15 minutes or until meringue is lightly browned.
